title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official CLI and server for running large language models locally (Llama 2, Mistral, Gemma, etc.) with a simple pull/run workflow.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client for the Ollama server; chat, embed, pull, and manage models from Python code.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node and browsers; same capabilities as the Python client.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration package exposing Ollama models as LLM, chat, and embedding components.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich web UI (formerly Ollama WebUI) for chatting, model management, RAG, and multi-user workspaces.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client library providing synchronous and asynchronous APIs to interact with Ollama.

title: ollama-rs
summary: Rust crate offering typed, async bindings to the Ollama HTTP API with tokio support.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: Experimental VS Code extension that turns Ollama models into a GitHub Copilot replacement.

title: ollama-chat
summary: Minimal React chat app bootstrapped with Vite, consuming Ollama’s OpenAI-compatible endpoint.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Community-maintained Helm chart for deploying Ollama server and models on Kubernetes.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Starter template showing how to build a RAG pipeline with Ollama embeddings and LangChain.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack 2.x integration providing OllamaGenerator and OllamaTextEmbedder components.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Community Go CLI that wraps the Ollama REST API with extra commands like bulk model download.

title: ollama-dagger
summary: Dagger module that spins up an Ollama service container for CI pipelines needing local LLMs.

title: ollama-nix
summary: Nix derivation for building and running Ollama on NixOS with optional CUDA support.

title: ollama-macos-swift
summary: Swift package exposing Ollama API using async/await, aimed at native macOS/iOS apps.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin that adds an Ollama chat pane and can summarize or rewrite selected notes.

title: ollama-zig
summary: Early-stage Zig client library for Ollama demonstrating HTTP requests and JSON parsing.

title: ollama-rustico
summary: Alternative Rust wrapper focused on ergonomic builders and native-tls support.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: Community-maintained C# SDK targeting .NET 6+ with async enumerable streaming.
